title: The Big Show
full_description: Scotland's Best Comedy Venue (Chortle Awards 2023, 2024 and 2025) presents The Big Show — a rotating all-stars lineup featuring the very best acts from the Monkey Barrel Comedy roster and the wider Fringe. A new lineup every night, curated by the venue that turned Edinburgh's comedy scene upside down.
ai_summary: Monkey Barrel's flagship showcase — Scotland's best comedy venue assembles a different all-star lineup every night from the finest Fringe acts on their books.
